project.name: Module 16c: Tags & Search
project.description: Pro-gated bookmark tagging system with enhanced search. lib/tags.ts provides tag CRUD operations (add/remove/list tags on bookmarks, get bookmarks by tag). Tags stored as readonly string arrays on Bookmark type. Search enhanced to filter by tag in addition to title/URL. Implements SyncableFeature interface for Option B readiness. UI: TagInput component for adding tags, tag pills on bookmarks, tag filter in search. Gated by useProGate() — free users see UpgradePrompt.
project.parent_plan: Hush Consolidated Build Plan — Day 5 (Pro features)
project.critical_path_position: Depends on Module 16a (ProGate — useProGate hook) and Module 15a (SyncableFeature interface). Must execute after both.

build_from_scratch: lib/tags.ts: tag CRUD (addTag, removeTag, getBookmarksByTag, getAllTags) — pure functions, tree in/tree out. Tags normalized to lowercase, max 50 chars.
TagSyncFeature class implementing SyncableFeature interface (requiresServer()=false for Option A)
ADD_TAG and REMOVE_TAG message types in lib/background-types.ts
Background handlers for tag operations with Pro status check
components/shared/TagInput.tsx: autocomplete input for adding/removing tags
components/shared/TagPills.tsx: colored badge display for bookmark tags
Enhanced useSearch hook with tag filtering

user_stories.title: lib/tags.ts — tag CRUD and SyncableFeature implementation
user_stories.description: Create lib/tags.ts with: addTag(tree, bookmarkPath, tag) → updated tree, removeTag(tree, bookmarkPath, tag) → updated tree, getBookmarksByTag(tree, tag) → Bookmark[], getAllTags(tree) → string[]. Extend Bookmark type with optional readonly tags?: readonly string[]. Implement SyncableFeature interface for tag index (serializes tag data for potential server-side sync under Option B).
steps: Extend Bookmark type in lib/types.ts: add readonly tags?: readonly string[]. Optional/additive — existing bookmarks without tags are valid.
RED: Test: 'addTag adds tag to bookmark and returns updated tree'
RED: Test: 'addTag creates tags array if none exists'
RED: Test: 'addTag deduplicates (no duplicate tags)'
RED: Test: 'removeTag removes tag from bookmark'
RED: Test: 'getBookmarksByTag returns all bookmarks with given tag'
RED: Test: 'getBookmarksByTag traverses nested folders'
RED: Test: 'getAllTags returns unique tags across all bookmarks'
RED: Test: 'TagSyncFeature implements SyncableFeature interface'
RED: Test: 'TagSyncFeature.requiresServer returns false (Option A)'

GREEN: Create lib/tags.ts. All functions are pure (tree in, tree out). Tag operations use path-based addressing like data-model.ts. TagSyncFeature class implements SyncableFeature: featureId='tags', serialize/deserialize for tag index, requiresServer()=false.
REFACTOR: Ensure lib/ purity. Tags are case-insensitive (normalize to lowercase). Max tag length: 50 chars.
acceptance_criteria: Bookmark type extended with readonly tags?: readonly string[] (optional, additive)
addTag: adds tag, deduplicates, normalizes to lowercase
removeTag: removes tag, returns unchanged tree if tag not found
getBookmarksByTag: deep traversal, returns matching bookmarks
getAllTags: unique set of all tags across entire tree
TagSyncFeature implements SyncableFeature from lib/sync-types.ts
TagSyncFeature.requiresServer() returns false
All operations are pure functions (tree in, tree out)
Tags normalized to lowercase, max 50 chars
Zero React imports
user_stories.verification: npx vitest run tests/unit/lib/tags.test.ts && npx tsc --noEmit

user_stories.title: Background handlers for tag operations
user_stories.description: Add ADD_TAG, REMOVE_TAG message types to background protocol. Wire handlers: validate session → apply tag operation to tree → SAVE → return updated tree. Both require Pro status check.
steps: Add AddTagMessage { type, bookmarkPath, tag } and RemoveTagMessage { type, bookmarkPath, tag } to background-types.ts.
Wire handlers: check cachedPassword + proStatus.isPro → get tree → addTag/removeTag → save → return.
RED: Test: 'ADD_TAG handler adds tag and saves tree'
RED: Test: 'ADD_TAG returns PRO_REQUIRED when not Pro'
RED: Test: 'REMOVE_TAG handler removes tag and saves tree'
GREEN: Implement handlers. Update switch.
acceptance_criteria: ADD_TAG and REMOVE_TAG message types added
Handlers check Pro status — return PRO_REQUIRED if not Pro
Handlers require unlocked session
Handlers save tree after mutation
Exhaustive switch compiles
user_stories.verification: npx vitest run tests/unit/entrypoints/background.test.ts && npx tsc --noEmit

user_stories.title: Tag UI components — TagInput, TagPills, and dialog integration
user_stories.description: Create TagInput (autocomplete input for adding tags), TagPills (display tags on BookmarkItem). Integrate into AddEditBookmarkDialog for Pro users. Pro-gated: free users see UpgradePrompt when accessing tag features in edit dialog.
steps: Create components/shared/TagInput.tsx: text input with autocomplete from getAllTags, Enter to add, X to remove. Sends ADD_TAG/REMOVE_TAG messages.
Create components/shared/TagPills.tsx: inline display of bookmark tags as colored badges.
Extend BookmarkItem: show TagPills when bookmark has tags.
Extend AddEditBookmarkDialog: add TagInput in edit mode for Pro users, UpgradePrompt for free users.
Wrap tag features with useProGate() check — free users see UpgradePrompt.
RED: Test: 'TagInput adds tag on Enter key'
RED: Test: 'TagPills renders tag badges'
RED: Test: 'Free user sees UpgradePrompt instead of TagInput'
GREEN: Implement all components.
acceptance_criteria: TagInput: autocomplete, Enter to add, X to remove
TagPills: colored badges for each tag
Pro users see tag features in bookmark edit dialog
Free users see UpgradePrompt instead of tag features
All tag UI gated by useProGate()
user_stories.verification: npx vitest run tests/unit/components/shared/ && npx tsc --noEmit

user_stories.title: Enhanced search with tag filtering
user_stories.description: Extend useSearch hook to accept optional tag filter, include tag matching in search results. Add tag filter dropdown to ManagerToolbar populated from getAllTags.
steps: Extend useSearch hook: accept optional tag filter, include tag matching in search results.
Extend ManagerToolbar: tag filter dropdown populated from getAllTags.
RED: Test: 'Search filters by tag when tag filter active'
RED: Test: 'Search matches bookmarks with matching tag even if title/URL don't match'
GREEN: Implement search enhancement and toolbar filter.
acceptance_criteria: useSearch accepts optional tag parameter
Search enhanced with tag filtering
ManagerToolbar has tag filter dropdown
Tag filter dropdown populated from getAllTags
Tag search gated by useProGate()
user_stories.verification: npx vitest run tests/unit/hooks/useSearch.test.ts && npx tsc --noEmit

what_exists.note: Read actual state from most recent progress.md. Requires Module 16a (ProGate) and Module 15a (SyncableFeature) to be complete before starting.
what_exists.pro_gate: Expected from Module 16a: lib/pro-gate.ts, hooks/useProGate.ts, components/shared/UpgradePrompt.tsx — must be implemented before this module starts
what_exists.syncable_feature: Expected from Module 15a: SyncableFeature interface in lib/sync-types.ts — must be implemented before this module starts
what_exists.search: hooks/useSearch.ts (from Module 13): debounced search by title/URL — exists and working

what_does_not_exist.tags: No lib/tags.ts. No tags property on Bookmark type. No tag UI components.
what_does_not_exist.tag_search: Search does not filter by tags.

tech_stack.tags_storage: Tags stored as readonly string[] on Bookmark type within the encrypted tree. No separate tag storage. This means tags are encrypted at rest with the vault password.
tech_stack.option_b_readiness: TagSyncFeature implements SyncableFeature. Today requiresServer()=false (tags in local tree). If fork protection needed: flip to true → tag CRUD routed through hush-sync backend → local cache only.
tech_stack.testing: Vitest + happy-dom. Mock useProGate to test Pro vs Free UX.
forbidden_patterns: Separate tag storage outside the encrypted tree
Tags visible to free users (must be gated)

licensing.note: Tag code is GPL-3.0 and visible. Gated by ExtensionPay. Forker can strip gate but loses sync, maintenance, trust.

known_risks.issue: Extending Bookmark type may affect existing tests
known_risks.action: tags is readonly and optional (readonly tags?: readonly string[]). Additive change.

known_risks.issue: Tag autocomplete performance with large tag sets
known_risks.action: getAllTags is O(n) over tree. Acceptable for v1.0 (<1000 bookmarks).

known_risks.issue: Pro gate mock complexity in tests
known_risks.action: Mock useProGate to return isPro:true/false. Established pattern from Module 16a.

dependency_chain.parallel_safe: Can run in parallel with 16d and 16e (all share ProGate dependency)

metadata.session_protocol: One Claude Code session. Commit per story.
metadata.quality_gate: All tests pass. tsc clean. Pro gate working. SyncableFeature implemented. Tags in encrypted tree.
metadata.human_review_required: Verify: Pro gate works, free users see UpgradePrompt, tag search works, SyncableFeature contract correct.
